meta.title: GEONYX | Careers and Development – Work in Industrial Manufacturing
meta.description: Career opportunities at GEONYX – positions for engineers, technical specialists and production staff in the field of industrial flooring and mineral systems for infrastructure. Long-term professional development, training and participation in strategic industrial projects.

hero.description1: GEONYX is a technology company disguised as a construction firm. You won't find trowels and spades here. We work with laser systems, tablets and chemistry.
hero.description2: We invest in you through our
hero.description3: , because nobody is born knowing everything. The path from apprentice to chief technologist is mapped out and depends solely on your results. No nepotism – only metrics.

sales.title: TECHNICAL SALES REPRESENTATIVE
sales.description: You're not a brochure salesperson. Your job is to enter the most demanding conditions, identify the problem and personally carry out a pilot test (Demo Application). You sell through a demonstration of strength, not sweet talk.

production.title: PRODUCTION & QUALITY CONTROL OPERATOR
production.description: You run the GEONYX kitchen. This is where the magic is born. You are responsible for transforming raw materials into the perfect product, operating dosing systems and mixers. There is no room for guesswork – everything is to the gram.

rnd.title: R&D ENGINEER – INNOVATION
rnd.description: GEONYX does not stand still. We're looking for a visionary who will optimise existing formulas and develop new products. You are the person who says 'this can be done better' and proves it in the laboratory.

form.title: ARE YOU READY?
form.subtitle: If you recognised yourself in the lines above, take action.
